revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - include flag variant

revision.text:
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = German Empire | shortname alias = Germany | flag alias = Flag of the German Empire.svg | flag alias-naval = War Ensign of Germany 1903-1918.svg | link alias-naval = Imperial German Navy | link alias-air force = Luftstreitkräfte | flag alias-army = War Ensign of Germany 1903-1918.svg | link alias-army = Imperial German Army | flag alias-navy = War Ensign of Germany 1903-1918.svg | link alias-navy = Imperial German Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Germany | related2 = Weimar Republic | related3 = Nazi Germany </noinclude> }}
[[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:Country data German Empire]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_German_Empire here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
